name: newrelic-mcp
description: New Relic MCP server with 55 tools for APM, alerts, dashboards, synthetics, and more
long_description: A Go-native MCP server providing comprehensive access to the New Relic observability platform. Includes 55 tools covering APM, infrastructure monitoring, alerts, dashboards, synthetics, workflows, service levels, and more.

newrelic_api_key.title: New Relic API Key
newrelic_api_key.description: Your New Relic User or Admin API key

newrelic_region.title: Data Center Region
newrelic_region.description: New Relic data center (us or eu)

write_enabled.title: Enable Write Operations
write_enabled.description: Allow creating, updating, and deleting resources (disabled by default for safety)
